# Q 

2 

VIEW EVO

## Exterior / coating

### Dedicated long-lasting rain repellent

Q² View EVO is a long lasting glass coating made to improve visibility and safety in poor weather. It bonds strongly to automotive glass and keeps water, dirt and road film from sticking. The EVO update improves ease of use and durability, especially on heavily used windscreens.

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2024/01/productmain-1700x1645-evo-view-box-1024x991.png)

[Technical Details](#technical-details)

## Durable and effective invisible windscreen in any condition.

Q² View EVO enhances visibility during rain and decreases the need for wipers at higher speeds. Water is rapidly pushed away, helping the glass stay cleaner longer. It also minimizes ice and dirt buildup, making everyday driving safer and more comfortable.

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/benefiticons28.svg)

IMPROVES VISIBILITY 

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/benefiticons81.svg)

WATER REPELLENT 

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/benefiticons82.svg)

WIPER RESISTANT 

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/benefiticons6.svg)

CHEMICAL RESISTANT 

what makes

Q2 VIEW EVO so special? 

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2024/01/ch2a2733z-2-1024x683.jpg)

Engineered to enhance safety by maintaining a clearer windscreen in rain and spray.

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2024/01/ch2a2718x-683x1024.jpg)

Strong bonding ensures long-lasting durability even on daily-driven cars.

## TECHNICAL DETAILS

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/860x640q2view.webp)

CAPACITIES 

20 ML

BOX CONTAINS 

Q² REPEL EVO 20ML / Q²M GLASS POLISH 20ML / APPLICATOR SET / MANUAL 

Durability 

Beading 

Self-cleaning 

Real World Lifespan

up to 24months / 50K km

ALCOHOL TOLERANCE

FULL

STARTING SPEED

50KP/H

Consumption

20ml/car

[Instruction](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2025/02/2023exteriorcoatingsmanual.pdf)

## HOW TO USE

Q 

2 

VIEW EVO

01
Clean the glass thoroughly and remove contamination. 

02
Polish the glass using Q²M GlassPolish to ensure proper bonding. 

03
Apply Q² View EVO evenly to the glass surface using the supplied applicator. 

04
Allow the product to react, then wipe off according to the instructions. 

05
Let the coating cure fully before exposing the glass to water. 

### Watch
product
video

## FREQUENTLY ASKED
QUESTIONS

01
Where can Q² View EVO be applied? 

On windscreens and exterior glass surfaces.

02
How long does it last on the windscreen? 

Up to 24 months, depending on usage and wiper wear.

03
At what speed does the water repellency start working? 

From around 50 km/h.

04
Is it safe with wipers and washer fluid? 

Yes. It is fully alcohol resistant and safe for regular use.

05
How should coated glass be maintained? 

Clean with regular glass cleaner. Avoid abrasive pads.

[FIND MORE ANSWERS](https://gyeon.zendesk.com/hc/en-us/sections/360000254018-Q-View)

We recommend complementary products that perfectly match your current one, creating a complete and convenient KIT. Together, they deliver the best performance and a seamless user experience.
